sourceRefs.ref: file:workspace/cell_papers/2025_Cell Research_SETD1B-mediated broad H3K4me3 controls proper temporal patterns of gene expression critical for spermatid development.pdf
sourceRefs.title: 2025 Cell Research SETD1B broad H3K4me3 PDF

paperRefs.title: SETD1B-mediated broad H3K4me3 controls proper temporal patterns of gene expression critical for spermatid development

claims.text: A staged mouse spermatogenesis atlas links coordinated histone modifications, DNA methylation, chromatin accessibility, and RNA expression to known developmental transitions.

locatorRefs.ref: file:workspace/cell_papers/2025_Cell Research_SETD1B-mediated broad H3K4me3 controls proper temporal patterns of gene expression critical for spermatid development.pdf
locatorRefs.locator: PDF pages 2-4, Results: Systematic profiling of chromatin epigenomic landscapes; Fig. 1
locatorRefs.summary: The paper profiles seven histone marks, NOMe-seq, DNA methylation, and RNA-seq across purified stages.

risks.summary: Atlas interpretation depends on stage purity, sorting protocol, and consistent processing across assays.

claims.text: Spermatids contain a conserved class of broad, strong H3K4me3 domains exceeding 5 kb at promoters and distal enhancer regions, with extensive overlap with broad H3K27ac.

locatorRefs.ref: file:workspace/cell_papers/2025_Cell Research_SETD1B-mediated broad H3K4me3 controls proper temporal patterns of gene expression critical for spermatid development.pdf
locatorRefs.locator: PDF pages 4-5, Results: Establishment of conserved broad and robust H3K4me3 and H3K27ac domains in spermatids; Fig. 3
locatorRefs.summary: The authors define spermatid broad H3K4me3 domains and report their number, width, genomic distribution, H3K27ac overlap, and human conservation.

risks.summary: The first-pass artifact records the published >5 kb definition; exact sensitivity to merge distance and peak-calling parameters is not tested.

claims.text: Broad H3K4me3 domains in spermatids show super-enhancer-like properties and are associated with high transcriptional activity at spermatid genes.

locatorRefs.ref: file:workspace/cell_papers/2025_Cell Research_SETD1B-mediated broad H3K4me3 controls proper temporal patterns of gene expression critical for spermatid development.pdf
locatorRefs.locator: PDF pages 5-6, Results: Spermatid broad H3K4me3 domains display SE features; Fig. 4
locatorRefs.summary: The paper compares broad H3K4me3 domains with H3K27ac-based super-enhancer features and gene expression.

risks.summary: Association with high expression does not alone establish that broad H3K4me3 instructs transcription.

claims.text: SETD1B is required for establishment of spermatid broad H3K4me3 domains; Setd1b conditional knockout largely removes broad domains while leaving regular H3K4me3 signals comparatively intact.

locatorRefs.ref: file:workspace/cell_papers/2025_Cell Research_SETD1B-mediated broad H3K4me3 controls proper temporal patterns of gene expression critical for spermatid development.pdf
locatorRefs.locator: PDF pages 6-8, Results: SETD1B methyltransferase is required for the formation of spermatid broad H3K4me3 domains; Fig. 5
locatorRefs.summary: Setd1b cKO data show loss of broad H3K4me3, especially distal enhancer signal, with regular promoter H3K4me3 remaining.

risks.summary: Genetic depletion supports SETD1B requirement but may include indirect developmental or cell-composition effects.

claims.text: Loss of SETD1B-mediated broad H3K4me3 redistributes TAF3 and RNA Pol II away from broad-domain targets toward regular H3K4me3 regions, disturbing transcriptional output.

locatorRefs.ref: file:workspace/cell_papers/2025_Cell Research_SETD1B-mediated broad H3K4me3 controls proper temporal patterns of gene expression critical for spermatid development.pdf
locatorRefs.locator: PDF pages 8-9, Results: SETD1B-mediated broad H3K4me3 controls stage-specific temporal patterns; Fig. 6
locatorRefs.summary: The paper reports reduced TAF3 and Pol II at broad-domain loci and Pol II redistribution after Setd1b depletion.

risks.summary: Broad H3K4me3 and SETD1B loss are not separated by local mark editing or rescue, so Pol II redistribution could partly reflect indirect SETD1B effects.

claims.text: SETD1B-mediated broad H3K4me3 helps enforce proper temporal expression patterns of stage-specific spermatid genes; Setd1b loss causes early and late genes to be expressed at inappropriate times.

locatorRefs.ref: file:workspace/cell_papers/2025_Cell Research_SETD1B-mediated broad H3K4me3 controls proper temporal patterns of gene expression critical for spermatid development.pdf
locatorRefs.summary: The paper reports altered expression timing for early and late spermatid genes in Setd1b cKO samples.

risks.summary: Bulk staged samples can mix gene-expression timing effects with shifts in cell composition or developmental progression.

claims.text: Germ-cell Setd1b loss leads to male infertility and abnormal spermiogenesis, including smaller testes, fewer epididymal sperm, reduced sperm motility, and abnormal sperm heads.

locatorRefs.ref: file:workspace/cell_papers/2025_Cell Research_SETD1B-mediated broad H3K4me3 controls proper temporal patterns of gene expression critical for spermatid development.pdf
locatorRefs.locator: PDF page 10, Results: Disruption of SETD1B and broad H3K4me3 results in male infertility and aberrant spermiogenesis; Fig. 7h-j
locatorRefs.summary: The paper connects Setd1b cKO to spermatid and sperm phenotypes.

risks.summary: Phenotype supports SETD1B importance but does not by itself prove the phenotype is mediated only through broad H3K4me3.

claims.text: RFX2 contributes to the specificity of broad H3K4me3 formation, with Rfx2 loss reducing many broad domains and co-IP evidence supporting RFX2 interaction with SETD1B.

locatorRefs.ref: file:workspace/cell_papers/2025_Cell Research_SETD1B-mediated broad H3K4me3 controls proper temporal patterns of gene expression critical for spermatid development.pdf
locatorRefs.locator: PDF pages 10-11, RFX2/SETD1B paragraph before and within Discussion; supplementary Fig. S12 references
locatorRefs.summary: The paper reports Rfx2 KO reduction of broad H3K4me3 domains and exogenous co-IP between RFX2 and SETD1B.

risks.summary: RFX2 has broader transcriptional roles, and the interaction evidence is exogenous; direct endogenous recruitment remains a limitation.

diagnostics: First-pass claims are extracted from PDF text and figure legends; no GEO data were downloaded or reprocessed.
The graph distinguishes SETD1B requirement for broad H3K4me3 from the stronger claim that broad H3K4me3 directly instructs all downstream transcription and fertility phenotypes.
